title: Remove repo-root workflows and commit routing gaps
summary: Delete the compatibility workflows tree after repointing every route, workflow reference, and closeout instruction to core/workflows or plan/workflows.
scope_items: Remove repo-root workflows and ensure commit closeout is the canonical commit workflow path.
done_when_items: No repo-tracked workflow guidance depends on workflows/ and mutating routed flows explicitly defer commit behavior to commit_closeout.md.
